search_query: remove pen ink from microfiber couch cushions
combined_text: How do you get INK out of couch cushions? Home & Garden Cleaning & Laundry How do you get INK out of couch cushions?my cat was playing with a pen while we were sleeping and it happened to doodle on couch. : ( They don't unzip (the cushions) to take off the cover and neither do the throw pillows. They are microfiber material. Please help! An
